Dr. Vishwannath Hiremath Has Successfully Completed Almost 27+ Years of Experience In The Field of Modern Dentistry And Practice. He Has Graduated From “Manipal University”. Further, He Has Completed His Post Graduation In “Oral And Maxillofacial Surgery”. From Ambedkar Dental College & Research Institute. He Is Been Dealing With All Major Kind Of Surgeries Such As Facial Jaw Surgery, Cosmetic And Also General Treatments. Recently He Was Awarded As “Best Consultant Dentist In South India’’ By National Health Care Excellence Awards, 2019, and He Was Awarded As “Best Consultant Dentist and Maxillofacial Surgeon In South India’’ By Devoxil Media, 2021. His Dedication, Enthusiasm And Hard Work Are All Reflected In His Work. According To Dr. Vishwannath Work Is Worship. He Is The Chairman Of The “Dr. Hiremath Hospitals’’ And “Dr. Hiremath Dental Artistry”. TESTIMONIAL What they say about us The Hospital Atmosphere Is Good And The People At The Hospital Are Very Co-operative And Helpful. Above All I Found That The Doctor Is Very Knowledgeable And Has A Lot Of Patience To Hear All My Problems. Suggested A  Procedure For My Dental Problems Which Is Not Only Cost Effective But Also Of The Latest Technology And Now I Am Really Very Relieved And Happy And Glad That I Selected A Right Doctor. SREEKANTH REDDY Visited Dr For Severe Gum  Problem,loose And Gapping Between The Front Teeth. Dr Advised Me Go For Flap Surgery And Comestic Correction . After Undergoing Flap Surgery And Cosmetic Correction. It Not Only Got Rid  Of My Pain ,cosmetic Correction Has Totally Changed The Way I Look.I Am Very Happy With The Treatment And Doctor. Thank You Dr For Your Explanation With Lots Of Patience And For Giving Me A New Look.
